signals.rationale: Strong fundamentals with growing services revenue. AI catalyst with iOS integration potential. Technicals support upside continuation.
Broad market exposure balanced between growth and value. Valuation elevated but Fed policy supportive. Macro headwinds offset by earnings resilience.
